creator: crest@rlwinm.de
text: The same problem (and its resolution) has been discussed on the FreeBSD package base mailing list. The the thread starts here: https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-pkgbase/2024-April/000386.html. A solution committed to 14-stable and 15-current is discussed here: https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-pkgbase/2024-April/000398.html.
